app.name: The Cube
app.maintenanceMessage: The Cube is temporarily under maintenance. Please try again later.
app.blockedMessage: This version of The Cube is no longer supported. Please install the official version.

update.title: The Cube 2.0.48 is ready
update.message: Install the latest version for faster playback start, background server warming, Sports page fixes, player lock, and picture-in-picture.
releaseNotes: Playback now starts from the first playable main stream instead of waiting for every server
Fallback servers warm in the background with limited concurrency
Fallback provider timeouts were shortened to avoid multi-minute waits
Cached warm candidates are kept for retry and recovery
Sports WebView is remembered instead of recreated during recomposition
Sports now reports page start, visible commit, finish, HTTP, DNS, SSL, and console failures
Fixed active development notices being filtered out by notification type
Added player control lock to prevent accidental seeking, volume, brightness, and server changes
Added picture-in-picture entry from the player
Restored system bars and app insets after closing the player

items.title: The Cube 2.0.48
items.message: Playback starts faster, fallback servers warm in the background, and Sports/player controls were improved.

items.title: Active Development Notice
items.message: THE CUBE is under heavy, active development. Expect frequent updates, sometimes multiple times a week, as features are added, bugs are fixed, and things get reworked. Breaking changes, UI shifts, and rough edges are part of the process right now.

items.title: Support The Cube
items.message: Support is optional and helps development. Third-party servers may still go down or return errors.
